daily_summary.headline: Aurora and SpaceX Resupply Highlight the Day

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Dragon CRS-2 SpX-34
top_events.description: SpaceX's 34th commercial resupply mission to the ISS, supporting critical science and research.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for launch and docking coverage.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: Moderate geomagnetic storm (G2) with Kp 5.67 offers aurora visibility down to 60° latitude.
top_events.action: Check skies for aurora visibility if you're in high-latitude regions.

top_events.title: Kinetica 1 | Unknown Payload
top_events.description: Launch of a Chinese solid-propellant light launch vehicle, Kinetica 1, by CAS Space.
top_events.action: Follow updates for mission details and outcomes.

opportunities.recommendation: Good viewing opportunity for high-latitude observers. Worth checking if you're above 60° latitude and skies are clear.
